pr.title: Non-record: Random Linear Maps + Learned Adapters (val_bpb=1.607, 1.92MB artifact)

output.summary: Random linear base weights saved via seed regeneration plus small rank-16 adapters learn adjustments, letting artifacts shrink to ~2MB.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Trains normally with sliding eval; no val-only regime.
techniques: Seeded random linear bases regenerated per layer
Rank-16 LoRA-style adapters store the learned updates
Favor 4-5 layer configs so few parameters can optimize within the time budget
